Class RegistryClassInfo<T extends Keyed>

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.classes.ClassInfo<T>
com.github.shanebeee.skr.RegistryClassInfo<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Type of item in the registry
All Implemented Interfaces:
Debuggable
public class RegistryClassInfo<T extends Keyed> extends ClassInfo<T>
ClassInfo wrapper class for Bukkit Registries

      public static <T extends Keyed> RegistryClassInfo<T> create(@NotNull @NotNull Registry<? extends Keyed> registry, @NotNull @NotNull Class<T> registryClass, @NotNull @NotNull String codename, @Nullable @Nullable String prefix, @Nullable @Nullable String suffix)
      Create a Registry ClassInfo with optional prefix and suffix
      Type Parameters:
      T - Type of registry
      Parameters:
      registry - Registry to wrap
      registryClass - Class of registry
      codename - Codename for ClassInfo
      prefix - Optional prefix to prepend to items in registry
      suffix - Optional suffix to append to items in registry
      Returns:
      ClassInfo from Registry
